headline: Royal Caribbean’s Australia Expansion And Valuation Discount Raise Investor Questions
summary: Royal Caribbean International (NYSE:RCL) has released its expanded 2027-28 Australian summer cruise lineup. The company is introducing Royal Beach Club Lelepa, its first exclusive cruise destination in the Southern Hemisphere. The new offering focuses on tailored itineraries for the Australia and South Pacific market. Royal Caribbean is a major global cruise operator, and this new Australian program highlights how the company is putting more attention on regional products and exclusive...

headline: Is Royal Caribbean (RCL) Using Australia–South Pacific Expansion to Sharpen Its Competitive Moat?
summary: Royal Caribbean International recently unveiled its past 2027–28 Australian summer program, featuring Anthem of the Seas from Sydney, Voyager of the Seas from Brisbane, and the debut of Royal Beach Club Lelepa in Vanuatu as its first exclusive Southern Hemisphere destination. This expansion of itineraries and creation of an exclusive beach club experience strengthens Royal Caribbean’s ability to differentiate its product and deepen guest engagement across the Australia–South Pacific...
